curation_notes: Single file patch in pkg/errors/abort.go. The Abort function used syscall.Getpgid(syscall.Getpid()) which returns a nil pointer in Docker containers, causing SIGSEGV. The fix adds a Docker environment check (os.Stat("/.dockerenv")) and falls back to os.Exit. The Windows sibling (abort_windows.go) uses os.Exit directly and is not affected. Pre-assigned class null-deref is correct — the root cause is a nil pointer dereference from the failing syscall.
